Natural Earth (naturalearthdata.com) — Admin 1 cultural vectors (10m scale).

Per https://www.naturalearthdata.com/about/terms-of-use/ (snapshot for shipping traceability):

- Natural Earth Vector Data is in the public domain.
- The authors request attribution: "Made with Natural Earth" and/or link to naturalearthdata.com.
- NACIS (North American Cartographic Information Society) is the steward.

Full terms: https://www.naturalearthdata.com/about/terms-of-use/
